questions.label: What is the Equipment ID number?
Do you notice any coolant or oil leaks?
Do you notice any hydraulic line issues and/or leaks?
Is the battery in good working condition?
Are the wheels in good operating condition?
Are all attachments or attachment points secure and in good working condition?
Does the equipment have a fire extinguisher?
Is the equipment in clean condition? (dirt, debris, etc.)
Does the equipment have adequate fuel?
Are all lights operational?(headlights, reverse, hazards, turn signals, brake)
Do the brakes work properly? (foot and park)
Do you have all necessary equipment for road travel, if necessary?
If the equipment requires maintenance immediately notify the Farm Manager to create a work order request.
